description: §60.2/§14.1.2 — an endpoint reqShape referencing an undeclared type (`NopeQuery`) reuses the §14.1.2 unknown-name machinery and fires E-TYPE-UNKNOWN-NAME — NOT a dedicated E-API-* code. This pins §60.2's `<api> introduces no new type machinery`: an undeclared type-ref is the generic type error, and no E-API-* family code double-reports it.
rationale: §60.9: an undeclared endpoint reqShape/responseType ref reuses E-TYPE-UNKNOWN-NAME (the §14.1.2 machinery) — `<api>` adds no new type machinery (§60.2). The path `/users` has no `${param}`, so E-API-PATH-PARAM-UNBOUND stays silent and no E-API-* code fires.
